title: Barely Modded: Server
body:
![pack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54ac16501edf9ddebe24f5a13c186dbe51483be1_0.webp)
# 🏰 Barely Modded: Server – Vanilla, Expanded

The **Barely Modded: Server pack** is the multiplayer companion to the [**Barely Modded Client Pack**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fantazs-barely-modded).  
It builds on the familiar vanilla Minecraft experience with **tweaks, mechanics, and lightweight content** that enrich community play — all while staying true to the vanilla feel.

Perfect for community servers, this pack adds **quality-of-life improvements, fun building tools, and light progression changes** while keeping things balanced and accessible — **100% compatible with vanilla clients**.

---

- ⛏️ **Polymer Integration:** Adds **server-side custom blocks and items** — no client mods required!
Seamlessly expands what’s possible on a pure vanilla client, powering new decorative and gameplay content.
*See the list below for mods taking advantage of Polymer.*

  <details>
  <summary>List</summary>

  - [777](https://modrinth.com/datapack/777): Gamble your Minecraft life saving away!
  - [Hit The Dummy](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hit-the-dummy): Lost too much at the slot machine? Take out your anger with this dummy!
  - [Hat Club](https://modrinth.com/mod/hat-club): Show off your style with fun collectible hats for every occasion!
  - [Backpack Club](https://modrinth.com/mod/backpack-club): Carry your adventures in style with deeply customizable backpacks!
  - [Portfolio](https://modrinth.com/datapack/portfolio): Same old paintings are boring. What about 80+ new ones!
  - [Visual Jukebox](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-jukebox): Adds some visual flare to the good ol' jukebox!
  - [PolyDecorations](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydecorations): Handcrafted furniture and decor to give your base some charm!
  - [Toms Server Additions: Decorations & Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/tsa-decorations): Refined furniture and decor for classy builds! Crafted in the new carpentry table!
  - [Banner Text](https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-text): Add letters, numbers and symbols as custom banner patterns!
  - [Colorful Campfires](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-campfires): Fire can have different colors, like in real life! 
  - [Colorful Lamp](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-lamp): Brighten up your builds with lamps in every shade you can imagine!
  - [Colorful Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-lanterns): Want colored lanterns instead? There, you have it!
  - [Copper Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/copperfire): Who knew that copper burned with a green flame!?
  - [Visual Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-armor-trims): See your armor trims right in your inventory so you always know what you've got!
  - [Clucking Ducks](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clucking-ducks): Quack up your farm with adorable ducks straight from Minecraft Dungeons!
  - [Earth Animals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals): Bring extinct Minecraft Earth creatures back to life—no time machine needed!
  - [Frog Concept Variants](https://modrinth.com/datapack/frog-concept-variants): Two stunning frog variants that almost made it into vanilla. Now they're here!
  - [SimpleGolden+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-golden+): Because everything's better dipped in gold—especially potatoes!
  - [End Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/endfire): Ignite the End with vibrant, otherworldly flames that redefine the dimension’s atmosphere!
  - [Night Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/nightlights): Light up the night with decorative glowing blocks that make every build shine after dark!
  - [Vocal Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vvi): Give villagers real personality with expressive new voices that bring your villages to life!
  - [Gentler Weather Sounds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gentler-weather-sounds): Calm the storm with softer, smoother weather audio for a more peaceful world!
  - [Emerald Equipment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fantazs-emerald-equipment): The armor tier Mojang never gave you, until now!
  - [Amethyst Equipment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fantazs-amethyst-equipment): A crystalline counterpart to that long-forgotten tier!
  - [A Very 1999 Christmas Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/a-very-1999-christmas-music-discs-fork): Jam to jschlatt's festive album with all tracks from the Deluxe Edition!
  - [Strings & Things](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/strings-and-things): String up fairy lights and festive garlands to make your builds sparkle!
  - [Re-Gifted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/re-gifted): Transform bundles into wrapped Christmas gifts with a simple rename!
  - [Crop & Kettle](https://modrinth.com/datapack/crop-and-kettle): Whip up culinary masterpieces with new crops, recipes, and cozy cooking blocks!
  - [Dark Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-paintings):  Gallery-worthy art from talented community artists—because your walls deserve better!
  - [Too Many Renames](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-named-variants): Over 6000 cosmetic items unlocked just by renaming at an anvil!
  - *More to come...*

  </details>

---

## 🌟 Notable Features

- 🌍 **Improved Overworld Generation:** Fresh, natural terrain that still feels vanilla.  
- 🗺️ **BlueMap + MapFrontiers:** Explore your world in real-time through a web-based interactive map.
- 🛒 **Player Shops & Lockable Containers:** Build a safe, player-driven economy with secure trading.
- 🌀 **Creative Dimension:** Dedicated creative world — perfect for testing builds.
- ⛏️ **Veinminer Enchant:** Mine entire ore veins at once with this late-game enchant.  
- 🧳 **Haul (Move Full Containers):** Pick up and move loaded chests and barrels.
- ⚡ **Optimization Mods:** Server-side performance improvements for smooth multiplayer.
- 🎤 **Simple Voice Chat:** Talk naturally with players nearby through in-game proximity voice.
- 💬 **Discord Link:** Bridge your Minecraft server chat with Discord text channels.
- 🪑 **Sit Anywhere:** Take a seat on slabs, stairs and carpets for extra immersion.
- ⚔️ **Graves:** Recover your items safely after death.
- ⏱️ **AFK Display:** See who’s active (or not) at a glance.
- 📊 **TabTPS:** Server performance stats right in the tab list.
- 🪓 **Mini Blocks:** Collect miniature decorative blocks for creative builds.

---

## 🛠️ Quality of Life & Tweaks 

A collection of small but impactful features, many inspired by **Vanilla Tweaks**:

- 🍳 **Recipe Tweaks:** Small crafting recipe adjustments for convenience
- 🔇 **Silence Mobs:** Mute noisy entities when you need peace
- 🗿 **Armor Statues:** Pose and customize armor stands for decoration
- 💀 **Player & Mob Head Drops:** Collect heads as trophies or decorations
- 🚫 **No Enderman Griefing:** Keep your builds safe from block-stealing
- 🔮 **Shapeless Nether Portals:** Build portals of any shape or size
- ➕ **And more QoL datapacks and mods**

---

**Barely Modded: Server** is designed to be the “next step” for communities who enjoy vanilla Minecraft but want **better tools, better worlds, and better ways to play together** — all without losing the game’s core simplicity.

---

<details>
<summary>Server Installation</summary>

Modpack is available on Modrinth, but can be easily installed on any hosting service that supports custom jars. Naturally it can also be installed on Modrinth Servers using it's built-in modpack installer

### Provided installer (Recommended)

Every release of a modpack provides extra file named `server.jar`. Just download it and run it like any other Minecraft server ([see MC wiki for running it locally](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Setting_up_a_server), or follow your server hosting tutorial about using custom jars). Only thing you will need to do is to accept Minecraft's eula.

### Using mrpack4server

You can use [mrpack4server](https://github.com/Patbox/mrpack4server) just as it's described in it's readme. Officially provided `server.jar` uses pre-configured version of it set to download the pack, so there should be no functionality difference aside of having to set it up manually.

### Other methods

Other known methods of installing modrinth modpacks include [mrpack-installer](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install), [itzg/minecraft-server docker image](https://docker-minecraft-server.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) or any other compatible installer, though I wouldn't suggest using them for non-technical users.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Allocated RAM</summary>

- Minimum: 4GB
- Recommended: 6-10GB (adjusts for player count)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits:</summary>

- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)

</details>
